title: Foundations of Causal Search
text: Causal relevance in scholarly retrieval explains why a document influences an answer. Early citation driven search links temporal priority with causal evidence.

title: Hybrid Neural Retrieval
text: Hybrid search combines BM25 with dense retrieval. Semantic search can recover paraphrases even when exact terms do not match.

title: Image Splicing Forensics
text: Image forensics detects splicing through noise inconsistency and copy move artifacts. Frequency analysis helps spot generated images.

title: Neural Network Training Notes
text: Deep learning training notes discuss optimization, neural networks, and model generalization for practical systems.

title: Counterfactual Ranking Explanations
text: Counterfactual ranking removes a document from the candidate set and measures how answers change. This supports interpretable search explanations.

title: News Timeline Causality
text: Temporal causality in news search values earlier reporting that shaped later coverage. Upstream sources can be more causally relevant than similar summaries.
